basic_details.short_information: Candidates up to 57 years of age who have MBA in HR/PM/IR, or PG Diploma in HR with relevant experience, or Defense background with HR experience are eligible to apply for these Manager-HR vacancies. The application process for IGRUA Manager-HR Recruitment 2026 is offline via email and will remain open until 13 May 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 57 years as on 01-05-2026.

qualification.education_qualification: MBA with specialization in Personnel Management / Industrial Relations / Human Resource Management (PM/IR/HRM)
qualification.details: MBA with specialization in Personnel Management / Industrial Relations / Human Resource Management (PM/IR/HRM) from a recognized University/Institution approved by AICTE (duration of not less than 02 years). Defense Officer with HR background of not less than 07 years. Degree in any discipline with Post Graduate Diploma in Management in Personnel Management / Industrial Relations / Human Resource Management (HRM) from a recognized University/Institution approved by AICTE. Minimum 07 years in Executive cadre/ managerial post in HR division.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IGRUA Manager-HR Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 13-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IGRUA Manager-HR recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the IGRUA Manager-HR post is 13th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Manager-HR post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Manager-HR position announced by Indira Gandhi Rashtriya Uran Akademi (IGRUA).

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Manager-HR role?
faq.answer: The required qualifications include an MBA in HR/PM/IR, or a Defense Officer with HR background, or a Degree with a PG Diploma in Management in HR/PM/IR, along with minimum 7 years of executive/managerial experience in HR.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Manager-HR position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Manager-HR post is 57 years as of 1st May 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Manager-HR post?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Manager-HR position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 1,50,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the IGRUA Manager-HR recruitment must be submitted via email.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the Manager-HR post?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned for the Manager-HR post for General/OBC categories. Please refer to the official notification for any other category details.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Manager-HR role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve shortlisting of applications, followed by a written test and an interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the Indira Gandhi Rashtriya Uran Akademi located?
faq.answer: Indira Gandhi Rashtriya Uran Akademi is located in Amethi, Uttar Pradesh, with the pincode 229302.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The recruitment for the Manager-HR post is on a contractual basis.
